DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marlon Crump, 431-9870, plaintiff and responding appearing in propria persona
Carol L. Healey of Bishop Barry Howe Haney & Ryder, 510-596-0888, appearing for defendant and moving party

This matter was not argued as plaintiff did not file an opposition or comply with the tentative ruling rule. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend res judicata. Order signed in open Court. (301/REQ/jf) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR# 2647

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Pltf A Vexatious Litigant And To Require Him To Furnish Security In The Sum Of $3000
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marlon Crump, 431-9870, plaintiff and responding appearing in propria persona
Carol L. Healey of Bishop Barry Howe Haney & Ryder, 510-596-0888, appearing for defendant and moving party

This matter was not argued as plaintiff did not file an opposition or comply with the tentative ruling rule. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC'S Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant And To Require Him To Furnish Security In The Sum Of $3000 is granted pursuant to CCP 391(b). Plaintiff is required to post $3,000 bond relating to any motions/actions relating to this case. Order signed in open Court. (301/REQ/jf) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR# 2647
